title: vaccinium barandanum var. cagayanense
intro: Vaccinium barandanum var. cagayanense is a rare species of blueberry plant native to the Philippines, specifically in the Cagayan Valley region. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in vitamins, minerals, and anthocyanins, which have been found to have numerous health benefits, including reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting cognitive function. Vaccinium barandanum var. cagayanense can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
